ddls:
CREATE TABLE "disinfection_byproducts" (
  "byproduct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disinfection byproduct */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the disinfection byproduct */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disinfection byproduct */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the disinfection byproduct */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* Chemical Abstracts Service (CAS) number for the byproduct */,
  "health_effects" TEXT /* Potential health effects of the byproduct */,
  "sources" TEXT /* Common sources of the byproduct in water */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("byproduct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_points" (
  "sample_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample point */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sample point */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the sample point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the sample point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the sample point */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the sample point */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample point was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sample point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring period */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the monitoring period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the monitoring period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the monitoring period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the monitoring period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the monitoring period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water quality sample */,
  "byproduct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disinfection byproduct */,
  "sample_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample point */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring period */,
  "highest_lraa" REAL /* Highest level of the Locational Running Annual Average (LRAA) */,
  "range_low" REAL /* Low range of sampled results */,
  "range_high" REAL /* High range of sampled results */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit used for measurement */,
  "mcl" REAL /* Maximum Contaminant Level (MCL) */,
  "mclg" REAL /* Maximum Contaminant Level Goal (MCLG) */,
  "typical_source" TEXT /* Typical source of the disinfection byproduct */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "sample_time" TEXT /* Time when the sample was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the sample */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was analyzed */,
  "analysis_time" TEXT /* Time when the sample was analyzed */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for analysis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_samples_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_samples_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_samples_sample_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_point_id") REFERENCES sample_points ("sample_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_samples_byproduct_id FOREIGN KEY ("byproduct_id") REFERENCES disinfection_byproducts ("byproduct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_samples_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES monitoring_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., technician, manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance standard */,
  "byproduct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disinfection byproduct */,
  "mcl" REAL /* Maximum Contaminant Level (MCL) */,
  "mclg" REAL /* Maximum Contaminant Level Goal (MCLG) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance standard became effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance standard expires */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference to the regulatory document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the water quality sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES water_quality_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the water quality sample that triggered the alert */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to handle the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES water_quality_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
